🎯 Top Leads for Today

Service Area: 20 miles around zip code 06002
Services: AI Automation (chatbots, workflow automation, scheduling)
Target: Real Estate Agencies
Date: March 13, 2026

🥇 #1

Elite Team Realty, LLC

📞 (860) 937-2909
🌐 https://elite-team-realty.com/
⭐ 5.0 stars (38 reviews)

Conversion Score: 8/10

Why They'll Convert:

  • High volume operation - 38 reviews = significant client throughput
  • Perfect rating to protect - 5 stars means they prioritize client experience
  • Own website - Tech-forward mindset, ready for automation
  • ROI is obvious - More leads = more closings without adding staff

Opening Line:

"Hi, I noticed Elite Team has an incredible 5-star rating with 38 reviews. I specialize in helping high-performing real estate teams handle MORE leads without adding staff. Quick question: What happens when someone visits your website at 9 PM on a Saturday?"

⏰ Best Time: Tuesday-Thursday, 10 AM - 12 PM or 2 PM - 4 PM

🥈 #2

MBA Realty, LLC

📞 (860) 953-1143
🌐 https://thembarealtyllc.com/
⭐ 4.8 stars (20 reviews)

Conversion Score: 7/10

Why They'll Convert:

  • Website needs updates - Perfect timing to add AI automation
  • Initial score 45/100 - Already identified pain points
  • Smaller = agile - Easier to get buy-in, faster implementation

🥉 #3

Shinebrite Brokerage LLC

📞 (860) 310-2079
🌐 Realtor.com Profile
⭐ 5.0 stars (31 reviews)

Conversion Score: 5/10

Why They'll Convert:

  • Strong volume - 31 reviews = consistent client flow
  • Perfect rating - 5 stars shows they deliver quality service
  • Lead leakage opportunity - No dedicated website = losing prospects
  • Leveling up angle - Position as professional upgrade from Realtor.com

⚠️ Red Flag:

No own website (using Realtor.com profile) indicates may not value tech investment. Will require more education on ROI. Consider as backup if #1 and #2 don't respond.

Opening Line:

"I found Shinebrite through your Realtor.com profile - 5 stars with 31 reviews is fantastic! I wanted to reach out because you're likely losing 80-90% of your web traffic. Every time someone visits at 8 PM Saturday and doesn't get a response, they're gone by Monday. I can show you how an AI chatbot captures those leads 24/7."

⏰ Best Time: Tuesday-Wednesday, 1 PM - 3 PM

📋 Today's Action Plan

Morning (10 AM - 12 PM):
☎️ Call Elite Team Realty - Focus on their 5-star rating and weekend lead capture

Afternoon (2 PM - 3 PM):
☎️ Call MBA Realty - Lead with website updates + AI automation angle

End of Day (4 PM):
📧 Send follow-up emails if voicemails left
📧 Send initial email to Shinebrite Brokerage

💡 Key Insight: Real Estate Is PERFECT for AI Automation

Real estate agencies handle high volumes of initial inquiries, need 24/7 availability, and waste agent time on unqualified leads. Your AI chatbot solves all three: captures leads when they're hot (nights/weekends), pre-qualifies buyers, and schedules appointments automatically. ROI is clear: just ONE extra closing per quarter pays for the system.

---
name: llm-secrets
description: List available LLM-accessible credentials. Use when you need API keys, passwords, or other secrets that have been made available to you.
---

# List Available Secrets

```bash
/job/.pi/skills/llm-secrets/llm-secrets.js
```

Shows the names of available secret keys (not values). Output example:

```
Available secrets:
  - BROWSER_PASSWORD
  - SOME_API_KEY

To get a value: echo $KEY_NAME
```

## Get a Secret Value

```bash
echo $KEY_NAME
```

Replace `KEY_NAME` with one of the available secret names.

## When to Use

- When a skill or tool needs authentication credentials
- When logging into a website via browser tools
- When calling an external API that requires a key
